title: BNY adds USDC minting and redemption to institutional custody platform
summary: The move deepens BNY's partnership with Circle and builds on the bank's role as the primary custodian of USDC reserves.

title: Can AI drain DeFi? Separating Claude Mythos hype from reality
summary: Claude Mythos has raised concerns about AI-driven attacks on DeFi protocols. However, the same AI tools are also available to security teams, not just attackers.

title: Fossil Fuel Subsidies to Hit $1 Trillion in War’s Energy Price Shock, UN Says
summary: Fossil fuel subsidies are projected to reach $1.1 trillion in 2026 as governments spend more to shield consumers from high energy prices triggered by the war in Iran.

title: Siris-Backed TPx Files Bankruptcy, Mulls $1 Billion Debt Cut
summary: Technology solutions provider U.S. TelePacific, also known as TPx Communications, filed for bankruptcy in Texas on Sunday after undergoing repeated debt restructuring while struggling to stay liquid.
